name: CodeIntegrity - Disallowed File For Protected Processes Has Been Blocked
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: CodeIntegrity - Disallowed File For Protected Processes Has Been Blocked
SIGMA Description: Detects block events for files that are disallowed by code integrity for protected processes

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3104 AQL filter query

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3104 AQL filter query
